name: @winplate/windows-electron
description: The Windows-native WinPlate status center built with Electron.

scripts.precheck: node --check src/main/activationCoordinator.js && node --check src/main/activationCoordinator.test.js && node --check src/main/weatherCoordinates.js && node --check src/main/weatherCoordinates.test.js && node --check src/main/tray.test.js && node --test src/main/activationCoordinator.test.js src/main/weatherCoordinates.test.js src/main/tray.test.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:unit && npm run test:python-service
scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/repositoryPaths.js && node --check src/main/integrationSecurity.test.js && node --check src/main/activationCoordinator.js && node --check src/main/settingsIpc.js && node --check src/main/serviceSettingsMigration.js && node --check src/main/serviceSettingsLifecycle.js && node --check src/main/windowsEnvironment.js && node --check src/main/desktopAppRegistration.js && node --check src/main/modules/index.js && node --check src/main/settingsStore.js && node --check src/main/appearanceSettings.js && node --check src/main/fileWriteQueue.js && node --check src/main/serviceSettings.js && node --check src/main/codexUsage.js && node --check src/main/deepseekUsage.js && node --check src/main/deepseekChatClient.js && node --check src/main/deepseekTokenUsage.js && node --check src/main/smartBriefService.js && node --check src/main/notifications/notificationStore.js && node --check src/main/notifications/detailService.js && node --check src/main/ai/notificationSummaryService.js && node --check src/main/networkSpeed.js && node --check src/main/pythonService.js && node --check src/main/windowMessaging.js && node --check src/main/windows.js && node --check src/main/windowPolicy.js && node --check src/main/tray.js && node --check src/main/startupPolicy.js && node --check src/main/notifications/digestEngine.js && node --check src/preload/preload.js && node --check src/shared/moduleRegistry.js && node --check src/shared/smartNotificationIconKeys.js && node --check src/renderer/refreshController.js && node --check src/renderer/moduleDom.js && node --check src/renderer/icons/smartNotificationIcons.js && node --check src/renderer/components/notificationDigest.js && node --check src/renderer/weatherScenes.js && node --check src/renderer/weatherEffects.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check src/shared/mockStatus.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:python-service
scripts.test:unit: node --test src/main/repositoryPaths.test.js src/shared/moduleRegistry.test.js src/main/integrationSecurity.test.js src/main/modules/index.test.js src/main/settingsStore.test.js src/main/appearanceSettings.test.js src/main/settingsIpc.test.js src/main/serviceSettingsMigration.test.js src/main/serviceSettingsLifecycle.test.js src/main/windowsEnvironment.test.js src/main/desktopAppRegistration.test.js src/main/serviceSettings.test.js src/main/codexUsage.test.js src/main/deepseekUsage.test.js src/main/deepseekChatClient.test.js src/main/deepseekTokenUsage.test.js src/main/smartBriefService.test.js src/main/windowMessaging.test.js src/main/notifications/digestEngine.test.js src/main/notifications/detailService.test.js src/main/ai/notificationSummaryService.test.js src/main/networkSpeed.test.js src/main/startupPolicy.test.js src/main/windowPolicy.test.js src/main/windows.test.js src/renderer/modules/modules.test.js src/renderer/refreshController.test.js src/renderer/moduleDom.test.js src/renderer/icons/smartNotificationIcons.test.js src/renderer/weatherScenes.test.js src/renderer/windowsSecurity.test.js
